user_query:
I'm launching a glow-in-the-dark tee on both Amazon and Etsy. Please do the following by reading inputs under input/:

1) Pricing: Use input/product_brief.json, input/keywords.csv, and input/rules.yaml to compute retail prices for Amazon and Etsy using the exact formula defined in input/rules.yaml with the platform-specific inputs from input/product_brief.json. Round both prices to 2 decimals. Save to output/pricing.json with keys: { "amazon_price": <number>, "etsy_price": <number> }.

2) Amazon listing: Create output/amazon_listing.json with fields: title (string), bullets (array of 5 strings), backend_search_terms (string). Requirements:
- The title must start exactly with the primary keyword from input/keywords.csv, be ≤ 200 characters, and must not contain any prohibited characters listed in input/rules.yaml.
- bullets must have exactly 5 items, each between 200 and 250 characters inclusive, and the sum of all bullet characters must be ≤ 1000.
- backend_search_terms must be ≤ 250 bytes, contain no commas, and must not include the brand name from input/product_brief.json.

3) Etsy listing: Create output/etsy_listing.json with fields: title (string), tags (array), description (string). Requirements:
- The title must start exactly with the primary keyword from input/keywords.csv and be ≤ 140 characters.
- tags must contain exactly 13 strings; the first tag must be the primary keyword.
- description must be at least 160 characters.

Use only the provided inputs and write the three files to the output/ directory with valid JSON structures.
